name: Text 9
text:
Site visit conducted with J.C. (Construction Lead), community leaders and local residents of Ulu Sebetan
Assessment focused on the existing gravity-fed system, pipeline alignment and supporting infrastructure
Two existing tanks identified — both unused, each ~10,000 litres (10KL) capacity
Reusing existing tanks improves storage capacity while minimising overall project cost
Findings will determine upgrade scope, material specifications and implementation approach
